question: The concept of 'intelligence explosion' (I.J. Good, 1965) predicts
options: Fine-tune AI models to align outputs with human preferences and values
Whether information destroyed by a black hole violates the laws of quantum mechanics

answer: A sufficiently advanced AI designing a smarter AI, leading to rapid recursive self-improvement
